title: サマースプリントシリーズ始まる！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without a moment's notice, we're called to
action.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Announcement! The Summer Sprint Series will
begin soon!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I ran last year too. Why the special
announcement?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Explanation! If you place well in the Summer
Sprint Series, something good will happen...
possibly!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww. That's not enough to motivate me.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, it's not compulsory! You may attend
summer camp normally or run in other races!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: That is all! Please think it over!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And that's what she said. I wonder what I should
do...
choice_data_list: If you do want to run, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest the Hakodate Sprint Stakes in late June,
the Keeneland Cup in late August, and the
Centaur Stakes in late September.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's run in the Hakodate Sprint Stakes before,
and if we want time in between races to rest and
prepare, these three are our best bet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... That sounds fun... but it doesn't really
matter to me. I'll let you decide!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... That sounds fun... but it doesn't really
matter to me. I'll let you decide!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I'll need to think long and hard about
whether it's the right decision to run in the
Summer Sprint Series.
